spec.name: The Sitting Room Of Naris
spec.description: You are standing in the middle of a really comfortable place. The walls are decorated with paintings of smiling Kings and Queens. The most attractive picture is one of a Prince in shining armour. By one of the walls there is an old armchair. The only exit is through the aspenwood door to the east.

east.description: The door seems to be a very HEAVY door, carved completely from the trunk of an Aspen tree.

extra_descs.description: This is truly a wonderful relic of the past. In it is a large cushion.
